title: Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links
snippet: The loophole allows spammers and scammers to send emails from a legitimate Microsoft email address typically used for sending genuine account alerts.

title: Beauty booking startup Fresha hits $1 billion valuation with KKR backing
snippet: Beauty and wellness booking marketplace Fresha says it has raised $80 million investment from KKR’s Next Generation Technology Growth fund, KKR's growth equity arm.
